reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good facilities. Good service. A cafe that's always full of customers and has a very large selection.

reviews.comment:
Es impresionante como te roban la NAFTA siempre que cargas, así te falten 10 para llenar tanque te dicen cargo 18 litros. Sinvergüenzas. Un solo empleado hay que te carga lo que es, el resto te re afana.

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable how they steal your gas every time you fill up. Even if you're 10 liters short of a full tank, they tell you they're putting in 18 liters. Shameless. There's only one employee who actually pumps the correct amount; the rest rip you off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJLVlXRFNBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Demoran mucho en atenderte, son muuuyyyy lentos. La atención es casi como que te hacen un favor. La atención para socios del ACA es poco más que pésima. Tenés que esperar siempre porque nunca están los responsables de seguros, no hay nadie.

(Translated by Google)
They take forever to serve you, they're incredibly slow. The service is almost like they're doing you a favor. The service for ACA members is nothing short of terrible. You always have to wait because the insurance managers are never there, there's nobody around.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJdXN2VGJREAE
